# select
"select * from a"
{
  "PlanID": "SelectStream",
  "TableName": "a",
  "Permissions":[{"TableName":"a","Role":0}],
  "FullQuery": "select * from a"
}

# select join
"select * from a join b"
{
  "PlanID": "SelectStream",
  "TableName": "",
  "Permissions":[{"TableName":"a","Role":0},{"TableName":"b","Role":0}],
  "FullQuery": "select * from a join b"
}

# select for update
"select * from a for update"
{
  "PlanID": "SelectStream",
  "TableName": "a",
  "Permissions":[{"TableName":"a","Role":0}],
  "FullQuery": "select * from a for update"
}

# union
"select * from a union select * from b"
{
  "PlanID": "SelectStream",
  "TableName": "",
  "Permissions":[{"TableName":"a","Role":0},{"TableName":"b","Role":0}],
  "FullQuery": "select * from a union select * from b"
}

# show
"show tables"
{
  "PlanID": "Show",
  "TableName": "",
  "FullQuery": "show tables"
}

# show tables #2
"show tables where Tables_in_keyspace='apa'"
{
  "PlanID": "Show",
  "TableName": "",
  "FullQuery": "show tables where Tables_in_dbName = 'apa'"
}

# show create database
"show create database anything"
{
  "PlanID": "Show",
  "TableName": "",
  "FullQuery": "show create database dbName"
}

# show table status
"show table status"
{
  "PlanID": "Show",
  "TableName": "",
  "FullQuery": "show table status"
}

# show binary log status
"show binary log status"
{
  "PlanID": "OtherRead",
  "TableName": ""
}

# show vitess migrations
"show vitess_migrations"
{
  "PlanID": "ShowMigrations",
  "TableName": ""
}

# show vitess migration logs
"show vitess_migration 'aaaaaaaa_bbbb_cccc_dddd_eeeeeeeeeeee' logs"
{
  "PlanID": "ShowMigrationLogs",
  "TableName": ""
}

# show vitess throttled apps
"show vitess_throttled_apps"
{
  "PlanID": "ShowThrottledApps",
  "TableName": ""
}

# show vitess throttler status
"show vitess_throttler status"
{
  "PlanID": "ShowThrottlerStatus",
  "TableName": ""
}

# select next value
"select next value from seq"
{
  "PlanID": "Nextval",
  "TableName": "seq",
  "Permissions":[{"TableName":"seq","Role":1}],
  "NextCount": "1"
}

# other
"desc foo"
{
  "PlanID": "SelectStream",
  "TableName": "",
  "FullQuery": "explain foo"
}

# other admin
"repair a"
{
  "PlanID": "OtherAdmin",
  "TableName": ""
}

# insert
"insert into a(eid, id) values (1, 2)"
{
  "PlanID": "Insert",
  "TableName": "a",
  "Permissions": [{"TableName":"a","Role":1}],
  "FullQuery": "insert into a(eid, id) values (1, 2)"
}

# update
"update a set b = 1"
{
  "PlanID": "UpdateLimit",
  "TableName": "a",
  "Permissions": [{"TableName":"a","Role":1}],
  "FullQuery": "update a set b = 1 limit :#maxLimit"
}

# delete
"delete from a"
{
  "PlanID": "DeleteLimit",
  "TableName": "a",
  "Permissions": [{"TableName":"a","Role":1}],
  "FullQuery": "delete from a limit :#maxLimit"
}

# ddl
"create table a(a int, b varchar(8))"
{
  "PlanID": "DDL",
  "TableName": "",
  "Permissions": [{"TableName":"a","Role":2}],
  "FullQuery": "create table a (\n\ta int,\n\tb varchar(8)\n)"
}

# load data
"load data infile 'x.txt' into table a"
{
  "PlanID": "Load",
  "TableName": ""
}

# flush
"flush tables a,b"
{
  "PlanID": "Flush",
  "TableName": "",
  "Permissions": [{"TableName":"a","Role":2},{"TableName":"b","Role":2}],
  "FullQuery": "flush tables a, b"
}

# syntax error
"syntax error"
"syntax error at position 7 near 'syntax'"

# named locks are unsafe with server-side connection pooling, plan is generated with NeedReservedConn set to true
"select get_lock('foo', 10) from dual"
{
  "PlanID": "SelectLockFunc",
  "TableName": "",
  "FullQuery": "select get_lock('foo', 10) from dual",
  "NeedsReservedConn": true
}

# set statement unsafe with pooling
"set @udv = 10"
{
  "PlanID": "Set",
  "TableName": "",
  "FullQuery": "set @udv = 10",
  "NeedsReservedConn": true
}

# savepoint
"savepoint a"
{
  "PlanID": "Savepoint",
  "TableName": ""
}

# rollback to savepoint
"rollback work to savepoint a"
{
  "PlanID": "RollbackSavepoint",
  "TableName": ""
}

# release savepoint
"release savepoint a"
{
  "PlanID": "Release",
  "TableName": ""
}

# unlock tables
"unlock tables"
{
  "PlanID": "UnlockTables",
  "TableName": ""
}

# analyze statement
"analyze table a"
{
  "PlanID": "OtherRead",
  "TableName": "",
  "Permissions": [
    {
      "TableName": "a",
      "Role": 1
    }
  ],
  "FullQuery": "analyze table a"
}

# call proc
"call getAllTheThings()"
{
  "PlanID": "CallProcedure",
  "TableName": "",
  "FullQuery": "call getAllTheThings()"
}
